name: PT Cahayasakti Investindo Sukses Tbk
summary: PT Cahayasakti Investindo Sukses Tbk engages in the furniture trading and construction service businesses in Indonesia and internationally. It operates through two segments, Construction Services and Furniture Project. The company is also involved in the wood working, handcraft, household, timber processing, general trading, distribution, agency and representative, and franchising businesses. In addition, it undertakes building and general works, including residential housing, industrial area, buildings, factories, roads, bridges, waterways, irrigation, excavation, retaining, electric installation, telephone, plumbing, gas, and other related works; and provides planning, implementation, and supervisory services. Further, the company develops and manages real estate properties; and rents spaces in stores. Additionally, it acts as a distributor, wholesaler, dealer, supplier, and commission house. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Bogor, Indonesia. PT Cahayasakti Investindo Sukses Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Andalan Utama Bintara.
